metadata.description: Middle-earth themed pinned subagent roles for Claude Code — the tlor-agents fellowship.

plugins.name: tlor-agents
plugins.description: Nine Middle-earth-themed pinned subagent roles for Claude Code: rohirrim-outrider, ranger-pathfinder, noldor-loremaster, dwarf-smith, gondor-builder, eagle-sentinel, elf-archer, orc-saboteur, hobbit-gardener.
